fetch_note: GitHub Discussions require GraphQL API access which is not exposed by the MCP server. Run locally to populate: gh api graphql -f query='{ repository(owner: "CherryHQ", name: "cherry-studio") { discussions(first: 100, orderBy: {field: UPDATED_AT, direction: DESC}) { nodes { number title category { name } author { login } createdAt updatedAt upvoteCount comments { totalCount } answer { author { login } createdAt } labels(first: 10) { nodes { name } } } } } }' > .context/discussions_raw.json
